creator: babak@farrokhi.net
text:
Hi,

Wikindx update to 3.4.5 :

--- wikindx.patch begins here ---
diff -ruN wikindx.orig/Makefile wikindx/Makefile
--- wikindx.orig/Makefile	Wed Oct 25 21:19:44 2006
+++ wikindx/Makefile	Wed Oct 25 21:21:08 2006
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	wikindx
-PORTVERSION=	3.4.3
+PORTVERSION=	3.4.5
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	wikindx
diff -ruN wikindx.orig/distinfo wikindx/distinfo
--- wikindx.orig/distinfo	Wed Oct 25 21:19:44 2006
+++ wikindx/distinfo	Wed Oct 25 21:23:15 2006
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (wikindx3_4_3.tar.gz) = b953e564938b5acfcff86738006d4480
-SHA256 (wikindx3_4_3.tar.gz) =
08de63c6e84689e77d55e2fdb11ff94e1322173185be4036cb5b9ac8e5ad3821
-SIZE (wikindx3_4_3.tar.gz) = 922809
+MD5 (wikindx3_4_5.tar.gz) = fd07c3a84c72733e1dfe7d69fb175a93
+SHA256 (wikindx3_4_5.tar.gz) =
d2f261bb7f0a1828b066c62fe13581f06c24635c7444da4f46532c09866ab794
+SIZE (wikindx3_4_5.tar.gz) = 928548
--- wikindx.patch ends here ---
